long_description: Teams notified that IMS Federal environment found to be running 11/12 version
short_description: IMS Fed environment found to be running backlevel code
current_status_next_steps:
Mitigation applied 2025-12-03 10:59:00 but reporter unable to test until tomorrow. Mitigation time is set, but leaving INC open until confirmation tested by reporter
Expected test/verification postponed due to IMS release cancelled, leaving open until next release
